item.title: Anand Rathi Share & Stock Brokers Q4 FY26: Profit Surges 126% YoY as Brokerage Momentum Accelerates
item.description: Anand Rathi Share & Stock Brokers Ltd., a small-cap capital markets player with a market capitalisation of ₹3,769 crores, delivered a stellar performance in Q4 FY26, reporting consolidated net profit of ₹41.56 crores—a remarkable 125.75% surge year-on-year and 12.32% sequential growth. The stock responded positively to the results, trading at ₹583.75 on April 15, 2026, up 1.79% from the previous close, as investors digested the company's strongest quarterly performance to date across multiple financial parameters. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Elecon Engineering Q4 FY26: Profit Plunges 96% as Tax Anomaly Masks Operational Resilience
item.description: Elecon Engineering Company Limited, a leading manufacturer of material handling equipment and power transmission solutions, reported a dramatic 95.90% year-on-year decline in consolidated net profit to ₹6.00 crores for Q4 FY26, down from ₹146.48 crores in the corresponding quarter last year. The shocking quarterly result, announced recently, sent the stock tumbling, with shares currently trading at ₹413.25—down 42.33% from their 52-week high of ₹716.55. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Are Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Nuvoco Vistas Corporation Ltd's latest results show strong sales growth with net sales reaching ₹3,306.75 crores, but profitability concerns persist as net profit declined 15% year-on-year despite a significant sequential increase. Overall, while sales momentum is positive, challenges in sustaining profitability and capital efficiency remain. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company's latest Q4 FY26 results show a record net profit of ₹623.91 crores, up 61.94% year-on-year, but revenue fell sharply by 79.69% to ₹3,185.46 crores, indicating significant operational challenges and reliance on non-operating income. Overall, the financial performance presents mixed signals, with concerns about sustainability and core profitability. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Hathway Bhawani Cabletel & Datacom Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Hathway Bhawani Cabletel & Datacom Ltd's latest results are concerning, showing a net loss of -₹0.18 crores and a significant decline in profitability and operational margins, indicating ongoing struggles in a competitive market. Investors should be cautious as the company faces substantial challenges and declining financial performance. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Den Networks Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Den Networks Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results are concerning, showing a 3.04% decline in net sales year-on-year and a significant 38.24% drop in net profit compared to the previous year, highlighting ongoing operational challenges and increased competition. The company's operating margins have also compressed, raising questions about its profitability and sustainability in the current market environment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Coastal Roadways Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Coastal Roadways Ltd’s stock price declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.25.1 on 15 Apr 2026, marking a significant downturn amid subdued financial metrics and persistent underperformance relative to market benchmarks. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: CMX Holdings Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: CMX Holdings Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development suggests a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns over the stock's medium to long-term outlook. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Dolphin Offshore Enterprises Forms Death Cross Signalling Bearish Trend
item.description: Dolphin Offshore Enterprises (India) Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock’s medium to long-term outlook. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do Pix Transmission Ltd's Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Pix Transmission Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 15 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical landscape presents a nuanced picture, with weekly indicators leaning bullish but monthly signals showing mild bearishness. This divergence invites a closer examination of whether the golden cross stands as a reliable signal or a lone beacon amid mixed momentum. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Lancor Holdings Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Lancor Holdings Ltd, a micro-cap player in the realty sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness ahead. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do Elgi Equipments Ltd's Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Elgi Equipments Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 15 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical landscape presents a nuanced picture, with weekly indicators largely supportive but monthly momentum showing signs of hesitation — does the full technical scorecard of Elgi Equipments Ltd lean bullish or does the golden cross stand alone against a bearish backdrop? Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do CG Power & Industrial Solutions Ltd's Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for CG Power & Industrial Solutions Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 15 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical and fundamental picture presents a nuanced view that tempers the enthusiasm this crossover might typically inspire. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: P I Industries Ltd Surges 5.11% to Day's High of Rs 3060 — Outperforms Sector by 2.1 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex rose 1.64% while P I Industries Ltd surged 5.11% on 15 Apr 2026, touching an intraday high of Rs 3060. Outperforming its sector by 2.1 percentage points, this sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly positive market. Time: 5 hours ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Gallantt Ispat Ltd. to 52-Week High of Rs 816.45
item.description: Surging past Rs 816.45 on 15 Jun 2026, Gallantt Ispat Ltd. has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a remarkable 76.56% gain over the past year. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of strong technical momentum and a market environment where small caps are leading the charge. Time: 5 hours ago
